claim, or two-Part B (institutional or non-institutional) claims, with a benign prostatic hyperplasia code 
in any position during the one-year reference period. When two claims are required, they must occur 
at least one day apart. 

The CCW’s criteria were developed after reviewing validated algorithms from the research literature
